final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an, a traditional Chinese scroll painting.

Style/medium: gongbi zhongcai (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors), traditional Chinese handscroll painting, Tang Dynasty court painting aesthetic
Composition: sweeping panoramic view of ancient Chang'an city at night, bird's-eye perspective transitioning to street-level details, horizontal scroll format
Subject: thousands of illuminated lanterns hanging across streets and courtyards, crowds in Tang Dynasty attire, palace towers and city gates
Scene/backdrop: Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape at night, imperial palaces, market streets, city walls, festive decorations
Lighting/mood: warm lantern glow illuminating the night, soft ambient light from thousands of paper lanterns, celebratory and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: deep indigo night sky as base, warm amber and gold lantern light as anchor, vermillion and jade green architectural accents
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture, mineral pigment saturation, delicate brushwork details, gold leaf highlights on palace roofs
Constraints: must maintain horizontal scroll format suitable for unrolling; balance between architectural precision and festive atmosphere
Avoid: anachronistic elements, modern lighting, Western perspective distortion, photorealistic rendering, generic digital painting style
